Implemented the ARC2 package for `2c0b0aff`. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2c0b0aff/verifier.py#L4) crops the dense nonzero rectangle with the largest count of complete green `3` orthogonal pluses, and the generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2c0b0aff/generator.py#L152) builds 3-4 separated `3`/`8` rectangles on a `0` background with a unique target patch in the official size band. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2c0b0aff/__init__.py#L1).

I used the Opus summary as a starting hint and discarded the Sonnet summary as misleading; the mismatch is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2c0b0aff/notes.md#L1). No new shared primitive was needed.
